description: A client-local `@var` used as a bound parameter in a server-side `?{}` INSERT outside a server function fires E-AUTH-001 — a client-controlled value reaching a DB write with no server-authority mediation (§52.4.4 / §52.11). Verbatim SPEC §52.4.6 worked example. E-AUTH-001 REPLACES the misleading E-DG-002: the value IS consumed by the write (just illegally), so the `notCodes` locks the 'never consumed' warning to silence per the §52.4.6 Expected-compiler-output.
